system.summary: Concentrate, see 3 min into future; take shock damage if you see injury.

effect.notes: See three minutes into the future; may take shock damage from traumatic visions.

description.value: The mutant can foresee dangerous situations that will personally affect it, but only up to 3 minutes into the future and only with intense concentration. For example, the mutant may look ahead to see what would happen if it opened a certain door, then avoid that outcome by choosing differently. If the vision includes damage to the mutant's own body, the shock causes immediate damage of 1d6. If the mutant foresees its own death, it immediately takes 2d6 damage and falls unconscious for 3-18 minutes. The referee may limit uses per day, perhaps by rolling 1d4 or 1d6.
